query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "identifying stimulus-driven neural activity patterns in multi-patient " biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by investigating the emergence of "stimulus-driven neural activity patterns" (specifically receptive fields and localized activity) within brain networks, which is the core biological mechanism and phenomenon the user's question seeks to extend. Additionally, it meets criterion (d) as a foundational methodological reference for modeling how network geometry and stimulus space interact to produce neural dynamics without fine-tuning.
